title: 最牛的终端开源了 warp，用过的来说说
content:
不需要输入 claude 再开始，直接 bash 输入，我要查询磁盘空间，自动帮你 du 执行，不用再记命令了，帮我解压文件，查找 cpu 高占用进程，发挥你的想象。 似乎只是使用路径变短，接入 bash ，不知道跟腾讯和阿里的 bash ai 什么区别。
用过的大佬说说场景
eventKey: 最牛的终端开源了-warp-用过的来说说
normalizedTitle: 最牛的终端开源了 warp 用过的来说说

title: warpdotdev/warp
content: Warp is a development environment created from a terminal mindset. Written in Rust, it offers agentic tools for building outside typical IDEs. The project has gained significant popularity, with 39,412 stars and 2,168 forks on GitHub.

title: 1jehuang/jcode
content: This Rust repository, *Coding Agent Harness*, is an open-source project with 1,038 stars and 111 forks. It offers a framework for building coding agents that can assist with code generation, debugging, or other automated programming tasks. The project provides a reusable harness written in Rust, enabling developers to integrate AI-driven coding capabilities into applications.

title: 整理了全网靠谱 Claude 中转 API 汇总，附避坑指南+Claude 模型真实性检测工具
content: The project compiles a vetted list of reliable Claude API proxy services, including official URLs, pricing (free tiers, subscriptions, domestic payment options), supported Claude models, latency, stability, and anti‑banning features. Each entry has objective pros and cons for quick comparison. Two tools are provided to verify the authenticity of the purchased models. The repository is updated continuously and invites community contributions and issue reports. Users are advised to test free trials, confirm authenticity, and choose long‑standing providers with clear support channels.

title: 我构建了一个更简单易用更快的自动化 AI agent, 主要 coding
content: I built a faster, simpler, and more usable Coding AI agent, released on GitHub (https://github.com/vcaesar/codg). Unlike dialog‑based tools, it accepts split and described requirements, uses Markdown memory, skills, and rules to automate tasks in one shot with fewer tokens and memory. It supports 40+ model providers, local models, command execution, asynchronous and concurrent operations, and offers IDE‑like file change tracking. The system is ready for testing, with ongoing monthly releases that edge toward full project takeover.
eventKey: 我构建了一个更简单易用更快的自动化-agent-coding

title: 开源一个 ai 生成壁纸的项目
content: An open‑source project delivers AI‑generated wallpapers using a Next.js front end styled with Tailwind CSS. State management employs Zustand, while user authentication is handled by Clerk and Supabase. Redis and RabbitMQ support caching and task queuing, and generated images are stored in Alibaba Cloud OSS. Stripe integration is planned but currently inactive. The code is available on GitHub (hulk-2019/arcwall) and can be previewed at ai520.wiki.

title: DeepSeek 注册资本提高 50%
content: DeepSeek, a Hangzhou-based AI research company, raised its registered capital from 10 million to 15 million yuan. Founder Liang Wenfeng increased his paid‑in capital from 1 million to 5.1 million yuan, boosting his ownership share from 1% to 34%. Reports indicate that the company may pursue its first external funding round, with potential participation from Tencent and Alibaba.

title: 高盛禁止香港分行员工使用Anthropic公司的Claude
content: Goldman Sachs has prohibited its Hong Kong employees from using Anthropic’s Claude AI, following concerns over the model’s reliability and potential regulatory risks. The move reflects the bank’s precautionary stance on emerging AI tools, aiming to safeguard data security and compliance. No additional details on broader impact are provided.

title: 为何DeepSeek的新模型反响平平
content: DeepSeek’s latest model has attracted limited attention because it offers only incremental improvements over existing offerings.  Its technical features, such as parameter count and training data size, do not markedly advance performance or versatility.  Users and analysts note that the model’s capabilities stay within the range of well-established competitors, lacking novel breakthroughs that would justify a significant shift in usage or investment.

title: 印度房地产将面临代理式人工智能带来的现实挑战
content: India’s real‑estate sector will soon confront the practical challenges posed by agentic artificial intelligence. The emerging technology’s autonomous capabilities could transform property transactions, valuations, and customer engagement, but also introduce regulatory, ethical, and operational complexities for developers, brokers, and regulators. The industry must adapt to these changes, balancing innovation with oversight to navigate the new AI‑driven landscape.
